data.title: Bitmine Immersion (NYSE: BMNR) stock fell due to Ethereum's 6% drop to $2,743.53 and Bitcoin traded at $83,195.06. Tom Lee advised against abandoning Ethereum despite market fluctuations.
data.description: Shares of Bitmine Immersion Technologies Inc. (NYSE: BMNR) saw a decline as Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) continued to fall during afternoon trading, with Ethereum dropping by 6% to $2,743.53. Meanwhile, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) was trading at $83,195.06. Tom Lee from Fundstrat advised investors against abandoning Ethereum due to Fear of Missing Out (FOMO), in response to a post from Bitmine pointing out the significant year-to-date increases of 18% for gold and 52% for silver. Lee emphasized the importance of sticking with successful investments and not making hasty decisions driven by FOMO.

data.title: Trump nominates Kevin Warsh as new Federal Reserve Chair to succeed Jerome Powell in May 2026. Warsh, a critic of QE, aims for policy reset.
data.description: President Donald Trump has nominated Kevin Warsh to lead the Federal Reserve, citing his experience, independence, and credibility. Warsh, a former Fed governor, is expected to take over from Jerome Powell in May 2026. As an opponent of the Fed's quantitative easing (QE) policies, Warsh has criticized the program for benefiting the wealthy and not delivering strong economic results. His nomination has sparked debate over the future of U.S. monetary policy, especially regarding the Fed's balance sheet. Warsh currently holds positions at the Hoover Institution, Stanford Graduate School of Business, and Duquesne Family Office LLC. His nomination highlights the potential shift in Fed leadership and policy approach moving forward.

data.title: Rose Sarfo Scholarship for Healthcare Students now accepting applications to support healthcare undergraduate students across US.
data.description: As of January 30, 2026, The Rose Sarfo Scholarship for Healthcare Students has opened its annual application period. This scholarship is available to undergraduate students nationwide in the field of healthcare. The scholarship aims to support students by providing financial assistance.

data.title: Dow Jones falls on surprise inflation data and Warsh nomination; Visa tumbles. Tesla rallies on SpaceX news.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline due to unexpected inflation figures and the announcement of the Warsh nomination. Conversely, Tesla saw gains following positive news from SpaceX. Visa also suffered a downturn. The stock market report highlighted these events, emphasizing the impact on the Dow Jones index.

data.title: Lilly to build $3.5B facility in Pennsylvania, creating 2,800 jobs for developing weight-loss medicines; 10th US site since 2020.
data.description: Lilly is set to invest in a $3.5 billion Lehigh Valley facility for the development of their upcoming weight-loss medications like retatrutide. This move is a part of the company's strategic plan to expand, marking the establishment of Lilly's 10th manufacturing site in the U.S. following the year 2020. The project is expected to generate over 2,800 job opportunities in manufacturing and construction sectors, showcasing a significant boost in employment prospects. The city where this facility will be based is Indianapolis, with the groundbreaking event scheduled for January 30, 2026.

data.title: Australia Defense Market Report 2025-2030 expects increased spending driven by acquisitions and RDT&E programs. Market size forecast included.
data.description: A report titled "Australia Defense Market - Size and trends, budget allocation, regulations, key acquisitions, competitive landscape, and forecast, 2025-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report presents a forecast for the market size as well as the expected growth rate over the next five years. It includes an analysis of the industry encompassing important market drivers, emerging technology trends, and primary challenges encountered by market players. The report provides insights into the defense market in Australia for the period spanning 2025 to 2030.

data.title: Rio2 acquires 99.1% interest in Condestable Mine in Peru from Southern Peaks Mining L.P. on Jan. 30, 2026.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on January 30, 2026, Rio2 Limited, a mining company listed on the TSX (RIO), OTCQX (RIOFF), and BVL (RIO), has successfully acquired a 99.1% stake in the Condestable mine situated in Peru. The acquisition was completed by purchasing the mine from Southern Peaks Mining L.P. This transaction marks an important development for Rio2 as it expands its operations into Peru.

data.title: Plug Power Inc will hold an investor Q&A forum on February 2, 2026 ahead of Special Meeting on February 5, 2026. Adjourned for broader participation.
data.description: In Slingerlands, New York, on January 30, 2026, Plug Power Inc. (NASDAQ: PLUG) announced that they will be hosting an investor Q&A session on February 2, 2026, for all stockholders. This session aims to address questions related to the proposals set to be voted on at the Company’s adjourned Special Meeting of Stockholders on February 5, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET. For Proposals 1 and 2 to pass at the Special Meeting, they require a majority vote from the Company’s outstanding shares. The meeting was adjourned to allow stockholders more time to vote and encourage wider participation.

data.title: Chevron beats Q4 expectations with adjusted earnings of $1.52 per share, up from $1.44, driven by 11% higher Upstream results.
data.description: Chevron Corp (NYSE: CVX) recently announced their fourth-quarter adjusted earnings, surpassing expectations. Analysts, led by Arun Jayaram, reiterated an Overweight rating on the stock. The adjusted earnings were reported at $1.52 per share, exceeding the anticipated $1.44 per share. This beat was attributed to an 11% increase in Upstream results and a 4% refining beat. The strong Upstream performance was driven by higher sales volumes, earnings from legacy Hess, and reduced operating expenses. Chevron's unique position as the sole U.S. oil major in Venezuela also contributed to its success. For more detailed information, please refer to Benzinga.com.
